scripts.study:sync: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-ChildItem systematic-reconstruction -Force | Remove-Item -Recurse -Force; Copy-Item -Path christianity-of-christ\out\* -Destination systematic-reconstruction -Recurse -Force"
scripts.study:deploy: npm run study:build && npm run study:sync && npx firebase-tools@13.35.1 deploy --only hosting
